basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Chief Operating Officer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIT Madras website. The last date to submit the application form is 03-06-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Advanced degree (PhD Preferred, Master's Minimum) in Engineering/Business Administration/Project Management and Bachelors in Electronics & Communication Engineering/ Electrical Engineering/Applied Physics/ computer Science, Minimum 5 years of industry experience with deep technical understanding of semiconductor/ photonics manufacturing and high level project operational management
qualification.details: Chief Operating Officer: Advanced degree (PhD Preferred, Master's Minimum) in Engineering/Business Administration/Project Management and Bachelors in Electronics & Communication Engineering/ Electrical Engineering/Applied Physics/ computer Science. Experience: A related discipline with a minimum of 5 years of industry experience with deep technical understanding of semiconductor/ photonics manufacturing and high level project operational management.

salary_details.details: Rs. 1,80,000/- to Rs. 2,20,000/- per month (5% increment every year)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Chief Operating Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Chief Operating Officer post at IIT Madras is 03 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Chief Operating Officer position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Chief Operating Officer position at IIT Madras ranges from Rs. 1,80,000/- to Rs. 2,20,000/- per month, with a 5% increment every year.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Chief Operating Officer role?
faq.answer: A Bachelor's degree in Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Applied Physics, or Computer Science is required. Additionally, an advanced degree (Master's minimum, PhD preferred) in Engineering, Business Administration, or Project Management is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Chief Operating Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates, followed by a test/interview, and finally document verification.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Chief Operating Officer position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Chief Operating Officer at IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity at IIT Madras.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum industry experience required?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of industry experience is required, with a deep technical understanding of semiconductor/photonics manufacturing and high-level project operational management.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Official Notification PDF' link provided in the Important Links section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the Chief Operating Officer position at IIT Madras must be submitted online through the official website.
